_meta.notes: Portfolio category pages (a.k.a. industries) share a hero with tagline + category name, a lead intro paragraph, optional bullet-list groupings (e.g. Suites/Buildings on healthcare), 1-4 'A Warehaus Partnership Brings' sub-cards (title + body), an optional pull quote testimonial with attribution, and an auto-generated Recent Projects list. 10 entries live at flat /{slug}/, 3 at /industry/{slug}/.

prompt: Extract structured fields from a warehausae.com portfolio category (a.k.a. 'industry') landing page. Capture hero text, intro prose, capability bullet groups (if any), partnership-brings cards, testimonial pull-quote, and the recent projects list.
systemPrompt: Extracting one portfolio category page on warehausae.com. Use null or empty arrays for fields that are not present. Do not invent testimonials or capabilities.

category_name.description: Lowercase category name shown in the hero (e.g. 'healthcare', 'adaptive reuse', 'civil engineering').

tagline.description: Pre-hero tagline (often 'We listen. We design. We deliver.'). May be missing.

lead_heading.description: H2 immediately below the hero framing the value (e.g. 'An Optimized Patient Experience').

intro_prose.description: Paragraph(s) following the lead heading, joined with double newlines.

capability_groups.description: Bulleted capability groupings shown on the page. Healthcare has 'Suites' and 'Buildings'. Other categories may have 0 or more groups.

partnership_cards.description: Cards under a 'A Warehaus Partnership Brings' style heading (e.g. 'In-Depth Healthcare Experience', 'A Focus on Patient Experience').

testimonial.description: Pull-quote testimonial near the bottom of the page. Leave fields empty if no testimonial appears.

recent_projects.description: Project list shown under 'Recent Projects' at the bottom. Deduplicate by URL.
